crime.quote: I am DCI Milton and I am investigating attempted murder

closed_world.quote: a murder was about to take place in Eastfield's Hospital on the 3rd floor

investigator.value: DCI Milton - official detective investigating the case
investigator.quote: I am DCI Milton and I am investigating attempted murder

suspect_architecture.value: Hospital-based cast including Elissa Lang (nurse protagonist), Angela Griffin (Sister in Charge), Mildred Coulton (Matron), with institutional hierarchy creating differentiated access and motives around hospital policy violations
suspect_architecture.quote: Nurse Lang, we need to have a serious word with you about violating hospital policy!

red_herring.value: Initial misdirection about the nature of the emergency - Elissa's call for 'urgent assistance' appears unrelated to the separate murder tip received by police for the same location
red_herring.quote: I never called to report a murder

clue_fairness.value: Reader shares Elissa's perspective throughout, including her confusion about the murder investigation and her direct observations of hospital events
clue_fairness.quote: I shook my head and raised my shoulders in response.

social_world.value: Hospital hierarchy with clear power structures - Matron asserting authority over nurses, challenging police jurisdiction, creating institutional barriers to investigation
social_world.quote: You have no authority here at this stage

investigator_wound.value: DCI Milton shows subtle vulnerability in personal interactions, particularly when smiling at child and being perceived as attractive, suggesting emotional guardedness
investigator_wound.quote: That man should smile more often, I thought, being aware of how attractive it made the stern detective look.
